title: Termination of Struck or Dissolved Entities
text:

NOTICE

entities failed to satisfy the Authority’s termination requirements and effective 12 November 2025

title: OneTRADEx Ltd. – In Official Liquidation
text:
29 October 2024
PUBLIC NOTICE
Re: OneTRADEx Ltd. – In Official Liquidation
The Cayman Islands Monetary Authority (“the Authority”) wishes to advise the public that on
15 October 2024, OneTRADEx LTD. (“OneTRADEx”) was placed into official liquidation with
Messrs. Kenneth Melvin Krys and Mark Richard Longbottom of Krys Global appointed as Joint
Official Liquidators (“JOLs”). OneTRADEx had been placed into Provisional Liquidation by the
Grand Court of the Cayman Islands on 27 September 2019.
In view of the appointment of the JOLs, the Authority has revoked OneTRADEx’s Full Securities
License pursuant to section 17(6)(d) of the Securities Investment Business Act (2020
Revision, as amended) effective from 15 October 2024.
Enquiries to the JOLs should be forwarded to Mr. Mark Longbottom by email at
Mark.Longbottom@krys-global.com or telephone 345-947-4700.

title: Premier Assurance Group SPC Ltd. – In Official Liquidation
text:
class="news-detail cms">

 RE: Premier Assurance Group SPC Ltd. – In Official Liquidation 

 The Cayman Islands Monetary Authority (“the Authority”) wishes to advise the public that on 19 April 2021, Premier Assurance Group SPC Ltd. (“Premier”) was placed into official liquidation with Messrs. Jeffery Stower and Jason Robinson of KPMG Cayman Islands appointed as Joint Official Liquidators (“JOLs”). 

 Messrs. Stower and Robinson were the Joint Provisional Liquidators of Premier as appointed by the Grand Court of the Cayman Islands on 27 October 2020. 

 In view of the appointment of the JOLS, the Authority has revoked Premier’s Class B(iii) Insurer’s Licence pursuant to section 24(6)(b) of the Insurance Act, 2010 effective from 19 April 2021. 

 Enquiries to the JOLs should be forwarded to Thomas Anderson by email at tomanderson1@kpmg.ky or by telephone 345-914-4725.
